# Yakushima Bus / 屋久岛公交查询 (yakushimabus.com)

> Independent trilingual bus timetable and island travel tool for Yakushima (Kagoshima, Japan). Mobile-first: next bus, fares, ferry access, POI map, trekking refs. Data from official operator PDFs; not affiliated with Tanegashima Yakushima Kotsu.

## Pages

- [Bus timetable & next departure](https://yakushimabus.com/): Search 48 stops, day types (weekday/Sat/sun-holiday), next departure in JST, presets (Miyanoura–Anbo, Shiratani, Arakawa trailhead Mar–Nov). Official PDF embedded.
- [Routes & fares](https://yakushimabus.com/fare/): Official route map PDF (JA/EN), mobile image preview, stop picker, adult one-way fare lookup, day pass sales points.
- [Island POI map](https://yakushimabus.com/map/): Historic sites, hot springs, beaches, souvenirs, supermarkets, pharmacies, ATMs; verified bus stops with navigation and timetable links.
- [Ferry & island access](https://yakushimabus.com/ferry/): Jetfoil and ferry Kagoshima–Yakushima, airport bus, fares and seasonal notes.
- [Trekking reference](https://yakushimabus.com/trekking/): Jomon Sugi, Taikoiwa, Miyanoura-dake courses with bus connections and official PDFs.
- [Travel without a car](https://yakushimabus.com/without-car/): How to cover Yakushima by bus and ferry; links to all tools above.
- [About this site](https://yakushimabus.com/about/): Maintainer, data sources, contact (yimleung.ly@gmail.com).
- [Product intro & demo video](https://yakushimabus.com/intro/): Feature overview (noindex; for humans sharing the site).

## Languages

Japanese (primary), Simplified Chinese, English — `?lang=ja|zh|en` on any page; stop names always show Japanese for on-site recognition.

## Official data sources

- Bus timetables: Tanegashima Yakushima Kotsu / Yakushima Tourism Association PDFs (yakukan.jp), Mar 2026 revision
- Fares: official route map fare table (Mar 2024 revision; estimates for some stops)
- Ferry: TYKousoku / operator sites (see access page)

## Coverage

Yakushima Island buses: Miyanoura Port, Anbo, Shiratani Unsuikyo, Yakusugi Museum, Arakawa trail bus (Mar–Nov), Matsubanda winter routes.

## Key facts (weekday · Mar 2026 timetable · adult one-way)

| Route | Buses | First–last dep. | Fare |
|-------|-------|-----------------|------|
| Miyanoura Port → Yakushima Airport | 10 | 05:50–15:20 | ¥590 |
| Yakushima Airport → Miyanoura Port | 9 | 06:06–19:06 | ¥590 |
| Miyanoura Port → Shiratani Unsuikyo | 4 | 08:20–15:30 | ¥530 |
| Shiratani → Miyanoura Port | 4 | 09:00–16:10 | ¥530 |
| Miyanoura Port → Anbo | 9 | 08:00–15:20 | ¥870 |
| Anbo → Yakusugi Museum | 3 | 05:23–13:38 | ¥240 |

- Day pass (reference): ¥2,500 (1 day), ¥4,000 (3 days), ¥5,000 (4 days); child half fare.
- Jomon Sugi: route bus to Yakusugi Museum, then Arakawa shuttle Mar–Nov (separate fare).
- Fares from official table Mar 2024 revision. Independent site — not the bus operator.
